metadata.description: The indie Apple developer stack: the apple-skills knowledge library and the SwiftShip /apple:* workflow.

plugins.name: apple-skills
plugins.description: 161 Apple platform development skills across 23 categories (iOS, macOS, watchOS, visionOS): code generators, product workflow, App Store/ASO, testing and TDD, design, performance, security, and more. Surfaced as 23 category skills that route to the full library.

plugins.name: apple
plugins.description: SwiftShip — 52 /apple:* workflow commands + 6 pinned agents: idea validation, roadmap, plan, build, review, TestFlight, App Store submission, and post-launch growth. Install apple-skills alongside it (its commands read that library).
